157 D0500J2_STF_SHRT_TMPR_FREQ_CD D0500J2_STF_SHRT_TMPR_FREQ_CD D0500J2 Staff Assessment of Resident Mood - Short Temper Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column contains the staff assessment of the frequency that the resident is short-tempered or easily annoyed. ;-=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more
